rows.label: tlk70000045_02_msg0002
rows.name:
Rikoko not only one scared. All
people scared! So Rikoko getting
extra scary feeling now.

rows.label: tlk70000045_02_msg0003
rows.name:
At times like this, city needs
musicians to cheer everyone up
with bright music, mo.

rows.label: tlk70000045_02_msg0004
rows.name:
Rikoko also want to help with flute,
but too shy to play alone...
